• Procedural mining world with tiles, ores, and custom textures.
  • Multiplayer sync, admin host election, chat, and trade system.
  • HUD gauges, shop, inventory, and explosion mechanics.
    const Game = new GameEngine();
    Sound.init();

This web game creates a procedurally generated mining map where the player can move, drill, build, and manage resources. It supports multiplayer with host election, chat, and trading, while providing HUD gauges, a shop, inventory management, and visual effects like explosions and custom textures. The code also includes UI modals, settings, and autosave functionality.
